Description: Verify navigation links 'Rooms' and 'Contact' smoothly scroll to the respective sections.
Test Steps: 1. Click 'Rooms' link in nav bar.2. Click 'Contact' link in nav bar.
Expected Result: Viewport smoothly scrolls directly to the targeted sections without reloading.

Description: Verify the navigation bar remains pinned to the top when scrolling down.
Test Steps: Scroll halfway down the page viewport.
Expected Result: Navigation bar remains persistent, pinned, and visible at the top of the screen.

Description: Verify the 'Admin panel' link correctly redirects to the Admin Authentication page.
Test Steps: Click the 'Admin panel' access link.
Expected Result: User is navigated away from the main page to the backend Admin Authentication gateway.

Description: Verify the footer displays correct property details and actionable legal links.
Test Steps: Inspect footer textual contents and links.
Expected Result: Property address, contact details, and actionable links for "Cookie-Policy" and "Privacy-Policy" are displayed.

Description: Verify room cards render with the correct image, class, description, and price.
Test Steps: Navigate to "Our Rooms" section.
Expected Result: System renders distinct room cards containing exactly: Image, Class, Description, and Price per night.

Description: Verify room cards scale and stack properly on a mobile viewport (375px).
Test Steps: Resize browser window to a mobile viewport width (e.g., 375px).
Expected Result: Room cards stack vertically and scale properly without horizontal scrolling or text clipping.

Description: Verify room amenity tags/icons are accurately rendered on the room cards.
Preconditions: Room has known amenities (e.g., WiFi, TV).
Test Steps: View a specific populated room card.
Expected Result: Specific visual tags/icons representing the assigned amenities are rendered on the card.

Description: Verify clicking 'Book now' reveals the booking calendar and guest form.
Test Steps: Click the actionable "Book now" button.
Expected Result: A booking calendar and guest details form dynamically reveal directly beneath or inside the active card.

Description: Verify the availability engine accepts valid future dates and updates the UI.
Test Steps: 1. Select Check-In date.2. Select Check-Out date.3. Click "Check Availability".
Expected Result: System accepts dates and transitions UI to display available matching rooms.

Description: Verify the system prevents a 0-night stay (Check-In equals Check-Out).
Test Steps: Select a Check-Out date that is exactly the same as the Check-In date (0 nights).
Expected Result: System blocks selection or displays a logical error indicating a minimum 1-night stay.

Description: Verify the system prompts the user when clicking 'Check Availability' with empty dates.
Test Steps: Click "Check Availability" with empty date inputs.
Expected Result: Action is blocked; UI prompts user to select a valid date range.

Description: Verify the booking calendar visually highlights a selected 3-night date range.
Test Steps: Drag cursor across 3 consecutive available dates on the calendar.
Expected Result: UI visually highlights the 3 selected dates continuously.

Description: Verify asynchronous calculation of total nights and total price upon date selection.
Test Steps: Select a 3-night date range on the calendar.
Expected Result: Total nights (3) and Total Price (£300) display asynchronously; no browser page refresh occurs.

Description: Verify past dates are disabled and unselectable on the booking calendar.
Test Steps: Attempt to click or select a date in the past.
Expected Result: Past dates are visually disabled and unselectable via mouse click.

Description: Verify the presence and editability of First Name, Last Name, Email, and Phone fields.
Test Steps: Inspect Guest Details form.
Expected Result: Text inputs for First Name, Last Name, Email, and Phone are present and editable.

Description: Verify validation error messages appear when submitting a completely blank booking form.
Test Steps: Leave all form fields blank and click "Book".
Expected Result: Submission blocked; validation error messages become immediately visible next to mandatory fields.

Description: Verify the First Name field enforces a minimum boundary of 3 characters.
Test Steps: Enter "Jo" in First Name, fill other fields validly, click "Book".
Expected Result: Submission blocked; UI error explicitly indicates minimum length is 3 characters.

Description: Verify the First Name field enforces a maximum boundary of 50 characters.
Test Steps: Enter 51-character string in First Name, fill other fields validly, click "Book".
Expected Result: Submission blocked; UI error indicates maximum length exceeded OR input truncates at 50 chars.

Description: Verify the Email field rejects inputs missing the standard '@' format.
Test Steps: Enter invalid email (missing '@'), fill other fields validly, click "Book".
Expected Result: Submission blocked; UI error requires valid standard email format.

Description: Verify the Phone field enforces a minimum boundary of 11 digits.
Test Steps: Enter 10-digit number in Phone, fill others validly, click "Book".
Expected Result: Submission blocked; UI error indicates minimum length is 11 digits.

Description: Verify the Phone field enforces a maximum boundary of 21 digits.
Test Steps: Enter 22-digit number in Phone, fill others validly, click "Book".
Expected Result: Submission blocked; UI error indicates maximum length is 21 digits.

Description: Verify the Phone field rejects alphabetical characters.
Test Steps: Enter alphabetical letters in Phone field.
Expected Result: Submission blocked; error states phone must be numeric OR field prevents alphabetical input.

Description: Verify a user can successfully submit a complete booking form with valid details.
Test Data: First: "John", Last: "Doe", Email: "j@test.com", Phone: "12345678901", Dates: Next Mon-Wed
Test Steps: Fill all details correctly, select valid future dates, click "Book".
Expected Result: Successful booking confirmation message is rendered; reservation is logged.

Description: Verify the 'Cancel' button collapses the booking UI and returns to the default view.
Test Steps: Click the "Cancel" button on the booking form.
Expected Result: Booking UI collapses completely, returning to default room card view.

Description: Verify the contact form contains Name, Email, Phone, Subject, and Message inputs.
Test Steps: Inspect contact form fields.
Expected Result: Inputs for Name, Email, Phone, Subject, and Message (textarea) are present.

Description: Verify a user can successfully submit a contact inquiry with valid details.
Test Data: Name: "John", Email: "j@t.com", Phone: "12345678901", Sub: "Query", Msg: "This is a 20+ char msg"
Test Steps: Fill all fields with valid data and click "Submit".
Expected Result: Visual confirmation successfully displays that the inquiry was dispatched.

Description: Verify the contact form prevents submission when all mandatory fields are empty.
Test Steps: Click "Submit" with all fields left empty.
Expected Result: Submission blocked; UI highlights all missing mandatory fields.

Description: Verify the Subject field enforces a minimum boundary of 5 characters.
Test Steps: Enter 4-character Subject, fill other fields validly, submit.
Expected Result: Submission blocked; error indicates minimum length is 5 chars.

Description: Verify the Message field enforces a minimum boundary of 20 characters.
Test Steps: Enter 9-character Message, fill other fields validly, submit.
Expected Result: Submission blocked; error indicates minimum length is 20 chars.

Description: Verify direct navigation to the backend URL without an active session forces a redirect.
Test Steps: Enter the backend admin URL directly into the browser address bar without logging in.
Expected Result: System denies backend access and forcefully redirects user to the authentication page.

Description: Verify the Admin Authentication page contains Username, Password, and Login inputs.
Test Steps: Inspect page elements.
Expected Result: Username and Password input fields are present alongside a Login button.

Description: Verify the system displays an error and denies entry for invalid admin credentials.
Test Steps: Enter invalid credentials and click "Login".
Expected Result: Entry prevented; a visible authentication error state is triggered.

Description: Verify the system grants backend access upon entering valid admin credentials.
Test Steps: Enter known correct credentials and click "Login".
Expected Result: User is successfully authenticated and granted backend portal access.
